title: Ohio Association of Disability Examiners (OADE) — Constitution
description: Constitution of the Ohio Association of Disability Examiners (OADE), a subsidiary chapter of NADE in the Great Lakes Region. Articles cover name, relationship/definitions, purpose, membership (all members must be NADE members; chapter dues optional), officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary, Treasurer), executive board, nominations and elections, committees, meetings (annual business meeting in August/September; 15% quorum), parliamentary authority, and amendment procedure.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Ohio (OADE) Chapter
source.title: Ohio Association of Disability Examiners Constitution

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Ohio-Const-Bylaws.doc. The text is a clean constitution; the closing amendment line leaves the 'as amended ... on ____' date blank, so no effective date is recorded and temporal_coverage is omitted. Document is titled a Constitution and references a Constitution-and-Bylaws committee; a separate by-laws section is not included in this conversion. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
